name: Creole Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onion, pepper, celery, butter, and garlic in a 2-quart round casserole dish.
2. Cover and microwave on high for 10 minutes or until the vegetables are transparent, stirring midway through cooking.
3. Combine lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, cornstarch, and Creole seasoning together.
4. Stir into the vegetable mixture along with shrimp; cover.
5. Microwave on high for an additional 5 to 6 minutes or until shrimp are opaque.
6. Garnish with parsley.
7. Serve over hot, fluffy rice or buttered noodles. Makes 4 servings.
